description: 'nuwoe' is a position or bounded portion in a process understood as moving towards a later condition. It suits learning, growth, repair, and other developments. 'kaero' (phase) belongs within a cycle or changing process, while a stage makes the direction of progression more prominent.
articulatory_notes: Place the tongue tip against the backs of the upper teeth for voiced dental 'n' and carry nasal airflow into high-back rounded 'u'. Keep the lips rounded for voiced 'w' and release into stressed middle-height back 'o'. Unround and bring the tongue forward for the separate final middle-height 'e'.

semantic_domains.temporal: a position or portion within a directed development
